title: Japanese-Style Toasted Crisp
description: A simple and satisfying Japanese-inspired snack made with toasted crisp, norwegian cheese and cultured bread.
instructions: Cut the cultured bread into thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
Place the toasted bread on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle the norwegian cheese over the bread.
Place the crisp on top of the cheese.
Bake in the oven for 5-7 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a minute or two.
